summary: docs/reference/agents.md aktualizován z 21 na 18 agentů. Přidán nový přehledový sloupec Mode Flag / Phase Arg a Style. Přidány sekce: v8.0.0 Agent Changes (rename tabulka), Mode Flag Dispatch (--yolo / default / --step-mode), Deprecated Agent Names (v7 aliasy s v9.0.0 removal note). Nahrazeny sekce triage-analyst + code-analyst → analyst (--phase triage/impact). Odstraněny sekce e2e-test-engineer, reproducer, browser-verifier. Přidány sekce test-engineer (--e2e flag) a browser-agent (--phase reproduce/verify). Všechny deprecated názvy pouze v deprecation kontextu.

AC-DOC-005.evidence: Main overview table has exactly 18 rows matching canonical list: analyst, fixer, reviewer, acceptance-gate, test-engineer, publisher, rollback-agent, spec-analyst, architect, stack-selector, scaffolder, priority-engine, spec-writer, spec-reviewer, browser-agent, deployment-verifier, backlog-creator, sprint-planner. Verified by grep simulation: each appears exactly once. REQ-DOC-005 columns (name, model, style, used-in-pipelines, mode-flag-or-phase-arg) present in overview table. 5 deprecated v7 names present only in v8.0.0 Agent Changes + Deprecated Agent Names sections + prose consolidation notes.

test_results.v8-doc-agents-enumeration: SIMULATED_PASS — grep pattern extracts exactly 18 canonical agents, each once
test_results.harness_regressions: none introduced — 53 pre-existing failures unchanged (xref-agent-registry and others fail due to other in-progress v8.0.0 tasks not yet complete)
